spec_match.rationale: The toolbar, status, breadcrumb, and preview displays now contain real selectedcontent descendants inside the select, with only CSS changing each visual context.

interactive.rationale: Changing the theme selection updates the selectedcontent mirrors and refreshes the option-data table.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now demonstrates styled native cloned DOM rather than manually updated regular divs.

edge_cases.rationale: The fallback shim clones the selected option into the same real selectedcontent nodes if native all-descendants cloning is missing.

references.rationale: Includes companion demo links and ChromeStatus.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared color variables and distinct context styling without raw color literals.

summary: Resolved: the page now shows the same cloned option DOM styled differently by four selectedcontent contexts inside the native select subtree.
